title: Create a purple cube button that disables after 4 taps

input.description:
# Task Metadata

## Task ID
task 6

## Title
Create a purple cube button that disables after 4 taps

## Stack
Flutter

## Action
Create a purple cube button that disables after 4 taps

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: True

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Instructions
Create test/white_cube_button.dart with a StatefulWidget called PurpleCubeButton. 80x80 purple square. After 4 taps the button becomes grey and ignores further taps. Show tap count as white text inside.

artifacts.implementation_plan:
# Implementation Plan: Create a purple cube button that disables after 4 taps

## Goal
Create `test/white_cube_button.dart` containing a `PurpleCubeButton` StatefulWidget — an 80x80 purple square that shows a tap counter as white text, turns grey after 4 taps, and ignores further taps.

## Owns (Files to Create/Modify)
- **Create**: `test/white_cube_button.dart` — new StatefulWidget file (note: filename is white_cube_button.dart per instructions, class is PurpleCubeButton)

## Integrates Into
-
